description_long: This is a modern two-story brick house with a dark gable roof and large rectangular windows. The front facade features a prominent garage door, a paved driveway, and a tiered stone planter that adds texture and visual interest. The house has a mix of brick and white exterior walls, with the rear side showcasing a spacious lawn and additional large windows for natural light. The side views reveal a combination of flat and sloped roof sections, as well as a secondary entry or utility area. The landscaping is minimal, with green grass surrounding the structure and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a dark gable roof, large windows, a garage, and tiered stone planters, surrounded by a green lawn and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, tiered stone planter, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gable roof, brick and white wall sections, and the stone planter wrapping around the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a white wall section, and an expansive green lawn.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mix of flat and sloped roof sections, brick walls, and the continuation of the stone planter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, steps, and a tiered stone planter; no porch or columns, minimal overhang.
